title: New era at Bakgat: Fresh management, fresh vibes
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Big changes are happening at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Big changes are happening at Bakgat – Langarm & Nightclub! With our brand-new management team, Loreen and Evan, at the helm, we’re bringing a fresh, customer-focused energy to the venue.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Big changes are happening at Bakgat – Langarm & Nightclub! With our brand-new management team, Loreen and Evan, at the helm, we’re bringing a fresh, customer-focused energy to the venue."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Safety and enjoyment go hand in hand at Bakgat – that’s why we’re introducing upgraded security protocols, trained staff, and a visible management presence to ensure every guest has a safe and memorable time.","html":"Safety and enjoyment go hand in hand at Bakgat – that’s why we’re introducing upgraded security protocols, trained staff, and a visible management presence to ensure every guest has a safe and memorable time."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Plus, don’t miss our special fundraiser for Manie Taljaard this Sunday, 10 August from 11:00, featuring live music, food, games, and a full day of community support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Saturday, 23 August we have a performance by well-known artist Piet Pompies. Entrance is only R50.","html":"On Saturday, 23 August we have a performance by well-known artist Piet Pompies. Entrance is only R50."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re upgrading the venue from top to bottom – with exciting improvements like striking new murals, revamped spaces, and more surprises on the way!","html":"We’re upgrading the venue from top to bottom – with exciting improvements like striking new murals, revamped spaces, and more surprises on the way!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From themed weekends and live shows to our popular monthly country dances and our fan favorite monthly Bottomless Brandy Sundays, there's always something happening at Bakgat.","html":"From themed weekends and live shows to our popular monthly country dances and our fan favorite monthly Bottomless Brandy Sundays, there's always something happening at Bakgat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With langarm, nightclub vibes, a pizzeria, and gaming – all under one roof, we’ve got your perfect night out covered. Come see the new Bakgat – where Mossel Bay comes to life.","html":"With langarm, nightclub vibes, a pizzeria, and gaming – all under one roof, we’ve got your perfect night out covered. Come see the new Bakgat – where Mossel Bay comes to life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
